# BP-117 negative: Echo Bind errors are returned to the framework.
lang: go
file: BP-117-safe.go
variant: echo
---
package sample

import "github.com/labstack/echo/v4"

type Request struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func create(c echo.Context) error {
	var request Request
	if err := c.Bind(&request); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return nil
}
